title: Supplementary Seasonal Employers list :: Immigration New Zealand
content:
## Supplementary Seasonal Employers list
Find employers who are approved to hire workers from overseas on a Supplementary Seasonal Employment Work Visa.
Supplementary Seasonal Employers can recruit temporary visa holders already in New Zealand to plant, maintain, harvest or pack crops when there are not enough New Zealanders available to do the work. You can apply for a Supplementary Season Employment work visa to work for a Supplementary Seasonal Employer.

## Supplementary Seasonal Employers
Use the filter to find your supplementary seasonal employer.
